title: Gym Membership Costs Compared 2026 | ijustwantto.live
description: Compare monthly costs, initiation fees, and amenities across 23 major gym chains including Planet Fitness, LA Fitness, Equinox, and more.

schemas.headline: Gym Membership Costs Compared 2026
schemas.description: Compare monthly costs, initiation fees, and amenities across 23 major gym chains.

mainEntity.name: What is the cheapest gym membership in 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: Based on our data, Crunch Fitness, Youfit, Vasa Fitness, Chuze Fitness, and EōS Fitness all offer base plans starting at around $9.99 per month. Planet Fitness and Blink Fitness start at $10/month.

Often, yes. Many gyms run promotions where the initiation fee is waived or reduced to $1 (like Planet Fitness frequently does). If you sign up near the end of the month, salespeople are often more willing to waive these fees.

mainEntity.name: What does a premium gym like Equinox cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Premium gyms like Equinox average around $168 for base access and can go up to $230+ per month depending on location and access levels, often with a $100 initiation fee.

mainEntity.name: Do any gyms offer month-to-month contracts without fees?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, many gyms offer month-to-month contracts, but they may charge a higher monthly rate or require an initiation fee compared to signing an annual contract.

mainEntity.name: Is CrossFit more expensive than a regular gym?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, CrossFit is generally more expensive, averaging between $50 to $100+ per month depending on the box, but this includes coached group classes and specialized programming rather than just access to equipment.
